entry.name: alteryx-aidin
entry.description: The Alteryx Analytics Automation Platform delivers end-to-end automation of analytics, machine learning, and data science processes that accelerate digital transformation. This App-ID covers Alteryx AiDIN, which augments the Alteryx platform with generative AI capabilities. Currently, only the "Magic Documents" feature is covered.

entry.name: alteryx-base
entry.description: The Alteryx Analytics Automation Platform delivers end-to-end automation of analytics, machine learning, and data science processes that accelerate digital transformation. This App-ID covers the Alteryx community forums, licensing portal, support portal, and the Alteryx Cloud platform.

entry.name: alteryx
entry.description: The Alteryx Analytics Automation Platform delivers end-to-end automation of analytics, machine learning, and data science processes that accelerate digital transformation. This App-ID covers the Alteryx community forums, licensing portal, support portal, and the Alteryx Cloud platform.

entry.name: amazon-bedrock
entry.description: Amazon Bedrock is a fully managed service that offers a choice of high-performing foundation models (FMs) from leading AI companies like AI21 Labs, Anthropic, Cohere, Meta, Mistral AI, Stability AI, and Amazon via a single API, along with a broad set of capabilities user need to build generative AI applications with security, privacy, and responsible AI. This App-ID covers the traffic of Amazon Bedrock.

entry.name: amazon-codewhisperer
entry.description: Amazon CodeWhisperer generates code suggestions ranging from snippets to full functions in real-time in the IDE based on developer comments and existing code. This App-ID covers the traffic of Amazon CodeWhisperer.

entry.name: amazon-q
entry.description: Amazon Q is a generative AI-powered assistant designed for business work. This App-ID covers the traffic of Amazon Q.

entry.name: amazon-sagemaker
entry.description: Amazon SageMaker is a fully managed service that brings together a broad set of tools to enable high-performance, low-cost machine learning (ML) for any use case. This App-ID covers the traffic of Amazon SageMaker.

entry.name: amazon-sagemaker-groundtruth
entry.description: Amazon SageMaker Ground Truth offers comprehensive set of human-in-the-loop capabilities, allowing users to harness the power of human feedback across the ML lifecycle to improve the accuracy and relevancy of models. This App-ID covers the traffic of Amazon SageMaker Ground Truth.

entry.name: amazon-transcribe
entry.description: Amazon Transcribe is an automatic speech recognition service that uses machine learning models to convert audio to text. This App-ID covers the traffic of Amazon Transcribe.

entry.name: amx-icsp
entry.description: AMX is part of the HARMAN Professional Division. AMX designs, manufactures, and markets a wide range of infotainment and audio solutions for the automotive, consumer, and professional markets. This App-ID covers communication from an AMX device such as a touch panel to a NetLinx Master Controller.

entry.name: azure-ai-services
entry.description: Azure AI services provide developers access to pre-trained, customizable AI models through APIs and SDKs. This App-ID covers the traffic for Azure AI Services application.

entry.name: bitbucket-atlassian-intel
entry.description: Bitbucket is a web-based hosting service for projects that use either the Mercurial or Git revision control systems for their source code repositories. Atlassian Intelligence is an artificial intelligence (AI) tool to help users work more effectively. This App-ID covers the traffic of Atlassian Intelligence's usage in Bitbucket.

entry.name: codium-ai
entry.description: Codium AI is an IDE extension that interacts with the developer to generate meaningful tests and code explanations for developers. This App-ID covers the traffic for Codium AI application.

entry.name: confluence-atlassian-intel
entry.description: Confluence is team collaboration software. Written in Java and mainly used in corporate environments, it is developed and marketed by Atlassian. Confluence is sold as either on-premises software or as a hosted solution. Atlassian Intelligence is an artificial intelligence (AI) tool to help users work more effectively. This App-ID covers the traffic of Atlassian Intelligence's usage in Confluence.

entry.name: figma-figjam-ai
entry.description: Figma FigJam AI is a AI assistant that helps the user to instantly visualize ideas, suggest best practices, and automate tedious tasks. This App-ID covers the traffic for Figma Figjam AI application.

entry.name: figma-base
entry.description: Figma is a design platform that develops web applications for interface design with offline features. This App-ID covers the traffic for Figma application.

entry.name: figma
entry.description: Figma is a design platform that develops web applications for interface design with offline features. This App-ID covers the traffic for Figma application.

entry.name: google-app-script
entry.description: Google Apps Script is a rapid application development platform that makes it fast and easy to create business applications that integrate with Google Workspace. This App-ID covers the traffic of Google Apps Script.

entry.name: google-chat-create
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat-create application.

entry.name: google-chat-base
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat application.

entry.name: google-chat-delete
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat-delete application.

entry.name: google-chat-download
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat-download application.

entry.name: google-chat-edit
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat-edit application.

entry.name: google-chat-invite
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat-invite application.

entry.name: google-chat-post
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat-post application.

entry.name: google-chat-upload
entry.description: Google Chat is a communication service developed by Google. It provides direct message, group conversations, and spaces, which allow users to create and assign tasks and share files in a central place in addition to chatting. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-chat-upload application.

entry.name: google-docs-copy
entry.description: Google Docs is an online word processor that lets users create and format documents and work with other people. This App-ID covers the copy traffic of Google Docs.

entry.name: google-docs-create
entry.description: Google Docs is an online word processor that lets users create and format documents and work with other people. This App-ID covers the create traffic of Google Docs.

entry.name: google-docs-delete
entry.description: Google Docs is an online word processor that lets users create and format documents and work with other people. This App-ID covers the delete traffic of Google Docs.

entry.name: google-docs-send
entry.description: Google Docs is an online word processor that lets users create and format documents and work with other people. This App-ID covers the send traffic of Google Docs.

entry.name: google-drive-web-create
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This App-ID covers the create traffic of Google Drive on the Web.

entry.name: google-drive-web-base
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This replaces and enhances what you might already know as the Google Documents List. It also covers the Google Drive app on mobile device.

entry.name: google-drive-web-delete
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This App-ID covers the delete traffic of Google Drive on the Web.

entry.name: google-drive-web-download
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This App-ID covers the download traffic of Google Drive on the Web.

entry.name: google-drive-web-edit
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This App-ID covers the edit traffic of Google Drive on the Web.

entry.name: google-drive-web-move
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This App-ID covers the move traffic of Google Drive on the Web.

entry.name: google-drive-web-share
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This App-ID covers the share traffic of Google Drive on the Web.

entry.name: google-drive-web-upload
entry.description: Google Drive is a cloud based file sharing and storage service from Google. Google Drive on the Web is an online interface to view your Google Drive contents. This App-ID covers the upload traffic of Google Drive on the Web.

entry.name: google-forms
entry.description: Google Forms is a survey administration software included as part of the free, web-based Google Docs Editors suite offered by Google. This App-ID covers the traffic of Google Forms.

entry.name: google-gemini
entry.description: Gemini is a family of multimodal large language models developed by Google, serving as the successor to LaMDA and PaLM2. This App-ID covers the web and mobile traffic of Google Gemini application.

entry.name: google-gemini-uploading
entry.description: Gemini is a family of multimodal large language models developed by Google, serving as the successor to LaMDA and PaLM2. This App-ID covers the uploading traffic of Google Gemini.

entry.name: google-meet-create
entry.description: Google Meet is a video communication service developed by Google. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-meet-create application.

entry.name: google-meet-base
entry.description: Google Meet is a video conferencing application.

entry.name: google-meet-invite
entry.description: Google Meet is a video communication service developed by Google. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-meet-invite application.

entry.name: google-meet-post
entry.description: Google Meet is a video communication service developed by Google. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-meet-post application.

entry.name: google-sheets
entry.description: Google Sheets is a spreadsheet application included as part of the free, web-based Google Docs Editors suite offered by Google. This App-ID covers the traffic for google-sheets application.

entry.name: hubspot-ai
entry.description: HubSpot is a marketing, sales, and customer service platform. This App-ID covers the artificial intelligence features built into the HubSpot platform.

entry.name: hubspot-base
entry.description: HubSpot is a company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts that develops and markets a software product for inbound marketing also called HubSpot. The software has features for social media marketing, email marketing, content management, web analytics and search engine optimization among others.

entry.name: hubspot-chatspot
entry.description: HubSpot is a marketing, sales, and customer service platform. This App-ID covers ChatSpot, an AI assistant integrated into the HubSpot platform.

entry.name: jira-atlassian-intel
entry.description: JIRA is a Java EE web-based bug tracking and issue tracking application developed by Atlassian Software Systems. Although JIRA is a commercial product, it is freely available to open source projects and non-profit institutions. Atlassian Intelligence is an artificial intelligence (AI) tool to help users work more effectively. This App-ID covers the traffic of Atlassian Intelligence's usage in JIRA.

entry.name: lightning.ai
entry.description: Lightning AI is an AI studio that lets developers build, train and develop AI models on the cloud. This App-ID covers the traffic for Lightning AI application.

entry.name: ms-onedrive-business-create
entry.description: Microsoft OneDrive is a file hosting service operated by Microsoft. This App-ID covers the creating traffic for OneDrive business application.

entry.name: ms-onedrive-business-delete
entry.description: Microsoft OneDrive is a file hosting service operated by Microsoft. This App-ID covers the deleting traffic for OneDrive business application.

entry.name: ms-onedrive-business-share
entry.description: Microsoft OneDrive is a file hosting service operated by Microsoft. This App-ID covers the sharing traffic for OneDrive business application.

entry.name: nlpcloud-api
entry.description: NLP Cloud is an AI platform that allows users to use the most advanced AI engines and train their own engines with their own data. This App-ID covers the API traffic of NLP Cloud.

entry.name: nlpcloud-base
entry.description: NLP Cloud is an AI platform that allows users to use the most advanced AI engines and train their own engines with their own data. This App-ID covers the traffic of NLP Cloud.

entry.name: nlpcloud
entry.description: NLP Cloud is an AI platform that allows users to use the most advanced AI engines and train their own engines with their own data. This App-ID covers the traffic of NLP Cloud.

entry.name: replicate
entry.description: Replicate is a service which allows running open-source machine learning models using a cloud API. This App-ID covers the Replicate web interface and API.

entry.name: ringsense
entry.description: RingSense is an AI platform from RingCentral that uses generative AI and conversational intelligence to analyze conversations. This App-ID covers the traffic of RingSense.

entry.name: ringcentral-base
entry.description: RingCentral provides a cloud-based business phone system. It offers PBX features such as multiple extensions; call control; Outlook, Salesforce, Google Docs, DropBox and Box integration; SMS; video conferencing and web conferencing; fax; auto-receptionist; call logs; and rule-based call routing and answering.

entry.name: simatic-logon-encrypted-login
entry.description: SIMATIC Logon is a tool for system-wide user administration and provides central access protection for SIMATIC applications and plant areas. With SIMATIC Logon, users are centrally managed outside the application or HMI device and the user logs on to and off from the application through the SIMATIC Logon Service. This App-ID covers SIMATIC Logon Service traffic that is sent using TLS encryption.

entry.name: simatic-logon-unencrypted-login
entry.description: SIMATIC Logon is a tool for system-wide user administration and provides central access protection for SIMATIC applications and plant areas. With SIMATIC Logon, users are centrally managed outside the application or HMI device and the user logs on to and off from the application through the SIMATIC Logon Service. This App-ID covers SIMATIC Logon Service traffic that is sent unencrypted.

entry.name: sourcegraph-cody
entry.description: SourceGraph Cody is an AI coding assistant that uses code graph to understand your entire codebase and help developers focus on writing and shipping code. This App-ID covers the traffic for SourceGraph Cody application.

entry.name: sourcegraph-base
entry.description: Sourcegraph is a code intelligence platform that helps developers understand, fix, and automate their code. This App-ID covers the traffic for Sourcegraph application.

entry.name: sourcegraph
entry.description: Sourcegraph is a code intelligence platform that helps developers understand, fix, and automate their code. This App-ID covers the traffic for Sourcegraph application.

entry.name: support-board
entry.description: Support Board offers an AI-powered platform that enhances the user experience of customers. This AppID covers the traffic of Support Board.

entry.name: trello-atlassian-intel
entry.description: Trello is a web-based project management application that uses the kanban paradigm for managing projects. Users can organize projects through the utilization of boards, lists and cards, which form a bespoke data hierarchy that facilitates effective management of projects, jobs and tasks. Atlassian Intelligence is an artificial intelligence (AI) tool to help users work more effectively. This App-ID covers the traffic of Atlassian Intelligence's usage in Trello.

entry.name: weights-and-biases
entry.description: Weights and Biases (W&B) provides developer tools for machine learning. This App-ID covers the main W&B web interface, the API, traffic from the Python client, and data transfer to/from W&B cloud storage.

entry.name: zendesk-ai
entry.description: Zendesk is a web-based help desk software with a support ticket system. This App-ID covers artificial intelligence features of the Zendesk platform.

motd-and-banner.message: Unauthorized use or access is strictly prohibited and may result in civil action or criminal prosecution.

entry.name: Firewall Transit
entry.description: Firewall Transit
